installCommand: cd frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm install ajv@8.17.1 ajv-keywords@5.1.0 --legacy-peer-deps --no-save
buildCommand: cd frontend && REACT_APP_SUPABASE_URL=$NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL REACT_APP_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=$NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY DISABLE_ESLINT_PLUGIN=true npx craco build
